
## population - Senate

- Figures: `figs/[TYPE]/m-population-Senate-[1:4].png`

```{r m-population-Senate}
#| fig-show: "hold"
#| out-width: "50%"
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| fig-cap: "Per Year"
#| fig-subcap: 
#|   - "Model 1: Cross Sectional"
#|   - "Model 2: Diff in Diff"
#|   - "Model 3: full Cross Sectional"
#|   - "Model 4: fill Diff in Diff"


# cross-sectional 
m_population_Senate_cross <- fenegbin (perYear ~ 
                               population_m  | 
                               Year_x_Agency,
                             cluster = "Legislator", 
                             data = data_member |> filter(chamber=="Senate") )

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_population_Senate_cross, gof_omit = "R.*", starts = T, stars = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}

coefplot(m_population_Senate_cross, horiz = T, drop = "(Intercept)") 



# 2
m_population_Senate_did <-fenegbin (perYear ~ 
                               population_m | Year_x_Agency + Legislator_x_Agency, 
                    cluster = "Legislator",
           data = data_member |> filter(chamber=="Senate") )

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_population_Senate_did, gof_omit = "R.*", starts = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}

coefplot(m_population_Senate_did, horiz = T, drop = ".theta") 


# 3
m_population_Senate_full_cross <-fenegbin (perYear ~ 
                                population_m + 
                              chair + 
                             ranking_minority + 
                             prestige + 
                             oversight +  
                    experience + 
                    majority + presidents_party | Year_x_Agency, 
                    cluster = "Legislator", 
           data = data_member |> filter(chamber=="Senate") )

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_population_Senate_full_cross, gof_omit = "R.*", starts = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}
coefplot(m_population_Senate_full_cross, horiz = T, drop = ".theta") 


# 4
m_population_Senate_full_did <-fenegbin (perYear ~ 
                             population_m + 
                              chair + 
                             ranking_minority + 
                             prestige + 
                             oversight +  
                    experience + 
                    majority + presidents_party | Year_x_Agency + Legislator_x_Agency,
                    cluster = "Legislator",
           data = data_member |> filter(chamber=="Senate") )

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_population_Senate_full_did, gof_omit = "R.*", starts = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}

coefplot(m_population_Senate_full_did, horiz = T, drop = ".theta")
```


### Table - population 

```{r m-population-Senate-models}
models_population <- list(
  "(1)" = m_population_Senate_cross,
  "(2)" = m_population_Senate_did,
  "(3)" =  m_population_Senate_full_cross,
 "(4)" = m_population_Senate_full_did
)

rows <- tibble(
  term = c("Dependent Variable"),
  `(1)` = c("Count"),
  `(2)` =c("Count"),
  `(3)` = c("Count"),
  `(4)` = c("Count") 
)

# call coefs
attr(rows, 'position') <- c(0)

# HTML
modelsummary(models_population, 
             title = "", 
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by legislator."))

beta_cross <- betas(m_population_Senate_cross)
se_cross <- standard_errors(m_population_Senate_cross)
beta_did <- betas(m_population_Senate_did)
se_did <- standard_errors(m_population_Senate_did)

# marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m_population_house_cross, variables = "population_m") |> #kable()
#   ggplot() +
#   aes(x = population_m, y = estimate) + 
#   geom_point() 
```
